en-US.title: SNAP Medical Shifts
en-US.subtitle: Anesthesia shifts & schedules
en-US.description:
SNAP connects anesthesia providers — CRNAs, anesthesiologists, and anesthesia assistants — with surgical facilities that need them.

FIND WORK THAT FITS
Browse open shifts near you, see transparent rates up front, and apply in seconds. Map and list views, filtered to your specialty.

YOUR SCHEDULE, ONE PLACE
See everything you're booked for — marketplace shifts and your practice schedule — in one clean calendar. Get notified the moment a schedule changes.

SHARE YOUR AVAILABILITY
Tell facilities when you can work with a few taps. Per-diem and locums providers can opt into schedule requests from practices they work with.

GET PAID TRANSPARENTLY
Every shift shows its rate before you apply. Track your earnings in the app.

BUILT FOR ANESTHESIA
SNAP is purpose-built for the anesthesia workforce — not a generic gig platform. Facilities on SNAP staff ORs, endoscopy suites, and surgery centers.

Providers are verified. Facilities are real. No spam, no middlemen markups.
